configuration.runtime_stubs_file.description: The file into which runtime stubs should be written.
configuration.target_regex.description: Regular expression to be matched against the module target. Only targets that match this regex will be instrumented.
configuration.function_regex.description: Regular expression to be matched against a function name. Only functions that match this regex will be instrumented.
configuration.demangle_function_names.description: Demangle functions names passed to the runtime.

module.filter.description: Static property filter to exclude instrumentation.
module.id.description: A unique ID associated with the given instrumentor call

module.id.description: A unique ID associated with the given instrumentor call

global.filter.description: Static property filter to exclude instrumentation.
global.address.description: The address of the global (replaceable for definitions).
global.address_space.description: The address space of the global.
global.declared_size.description: The size of the declared type of the global.
global.initial_value.description: The initial value of the global.
global.id.description: A unique ID associated with the given instrumentor call

function.is_main.description: Flag to indicate it is the main function.

load.filter.description: Static property filter to exclude instrumentation.
load.pointer_as.description: The address space of the accessed pointer.
load.value_size.description: The size of the loaded value.
load.value_type_id.description: The type id of the loaded value.
load.atomicity_ordering.description: The atomicity ordering of the load.
load.sync_scope_id.description: The sync scope id of the load.
load.id.description: A unique ID associated with the given instrumentor call

alloca.id.description: A unique ID associated with the given instrumentor call
